LAW AND MOTION 301, ATTORNEY EMILSON REPRESENT TO THE COURT THAT HE WILL FILE A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE AND STIPULATION TO CONTINUE THIS MOTION. THE COURT GRANTED CONTINUANCE OF DEFENDANT GREG BRONSTEIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT CONTINUED FROM JUN-27-2006 TO JUL-12-2006, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; REPORTER: LA VENA WARD, CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT GREG BRONSTEIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED FROM JUL-12-2006 TO JUL-17-2006, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 AS PARTIES HAVE FAILED TO SUBMIT COURTESY COPIES AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 8.5. PARTIES ARE TO SUBMIT COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR MOTION PAPERS AS SOON AS POSSIBLE TO DEPARTMENT 301. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT GREG BRONSTEIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN 5 DAYS TO ATTACH RENTAL AGREEMENT AS EXHIBIT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-17-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
